top_5_by_score.title: IAM policy 'AdminFullAccess' grants full admin (Action:* Resource:*)
S3 bucket 'prod-customer-data' has no public access block configuration
S3 bucket 'prod-customer-data' ACL grants READ to public internet
Security group 'prod-web-sg' allows ALL inbound traffic from internet

findings.title: Root account MFA not enabled
findings.description: The AWS root account does not have MFA enabled.
findings.remediation: Enable MFA for the root account via IAM console using a hardware MFA device.

findings.title: IAM policy 'AdminFullAccess' grants full admin (Action:* Resource:*)
findings.description: This policy grants unrestricted access to all AWS services and resources.
findings.remediation: Apply least privilege. Replace wildcard permissions with specific actions required.

findings.title: S3 bucket 'prod-customer-data' has no public access block configuration
findings.description: No S3 Block Public Access configuration exists for this production data bucket.
findings.remediation: Apply all four S3 Block Public Access settings at the bucket and account level.

findings.title: S3 bucket 'prod-customer-data' ACL grants READ to public internet
findings.description: Bucket ACL grants READ permission to AllUsers (public internet).
findings.remediation: Remove public grants from bucket ACL. Use bucket policies with specific principals.

findings.title: Security group 'prod-web-sg' allows ALL inbound traffic from internet
findings.description: Security group sg-0abc12345 (prod-web-sg) allows all inbound traffic (0.0.0.0/0).
findings.remediation: Remove the all-traffic rule. Allow only required ports with restricted CIDRs.

findings.title: Security group 'bastion-sg' exposes port 22 (SSH) to internet
findings.remediation: Restrict SSH to specific admin IP ranges or use AWS Systems Manager Session Manager.

findings.title: IAM user 'dev-john' has console access but no MFA
findings.description: User dev-john can log into AWS console but has no MFA device configured.
findings.remediation: Require MFA for user dev-john. Add MFA enforcement policy or SCP.

findings.title: Security group 'rds-sg' exposes port 3306 (MySQL) to internet
findings.description: MySQL port 3306 is directly accessible from 0.0.0.0/0.
findings.remediation: Place RDS in private subnets. Allow 3306 only from application security groups.

findings.title: Access key for 'ci-deploy' is 127 days old
findings.description: Access key has not been rotated in 127 days (threshold: 90 days).
findings.remediation: Rotate access keys for ci-deploy. Create new key, update CI/CD, then deactivate old key.

findings.title: S3 bucket 'logs-archive-2024' does not have default encryption
findings.description: Server-side encryption is not configured as default for this bucket.
findings.remediation: Enable default encryption using SSE-S3 or SSE-KMS.

findings.title: CloudTrail trail 'prod-trail' is not multi-region
findings.description: Single-region trail misses API activity in other AWS regions.
findings.remediation: Update trail to IsMultiRegionTrail=true to capture events across all regions.

findings.title: CloudTrail trail 'prod-trail' does not have log file validation enabled
findings.description: Without log file validation, tampered log files cannot be detected.
findings.remediation: Enable log file validation: aws cloudtrail update-trail --enable-log-file-validation

findings.title: No CloudWatch alarm configured for: root login
findings.description: CIS benchmark requires a CloudWatch alarm to alert on root account console logins.
findings.remediation: Create a metric filter and SNS alarm for root login events in CloudTrail.

findings.title: S3 bucket 'dev-assets-bucket' does not have access logging enabled
findings.description: S3 access logging is not configured. Unauthorized access attempts are unlogged.
findings.remediation: Enable S3 server access logging directed to a centralized security bucket.

findings.title: Security group 'old-test-sg' is not attached to any resource
findings.description: Unused security groups add complexity and may represent orphaned infrastructure.
findings.remediation: Review and delete unused security groups to reduce attack surface.
